title: Basic MaxDiff Design
oce_text:
[["design-maxdiff::design"]]
n_items = 10
items_per_task = 3
tasks_per_version = 8
versions = 4
run_dir = "./runs/design"
run_name = "v1"

title: Large Multi-Start Design
summary: 30-item study with parallel restarts for better optimization.
oce_text:
[["design-maxdiff::design"]]
n_items = 30
items_per_task = 5
tasks_per_version = 12
versions = 10
run_dir = "./runs/design-large"
run_name = "large_v1"
n_starts = 4
threads = 4
iterations = 500000

title: Verbose Design (per-version progress)
summary: Emits one progress line per completed version. Safe at any version count.
oce_text:
[["design-maxdiff::design"]]
n_items = 15
items_per_task = 4
tasks_per_version = 10
versions = 5
run_dir = "./runs/design-verbose"
run_name = "verbose_v1"
verbose = true
